service.name: Mixpanel API
service.description_for_ai: Product analytics platform. Track user events, funnels, retention, cohorts. Understand user behavior in mobile and web apps. Used by Yelp, DocuSign, Expedia. Use for product analytics, funnel analysis, user retention tracking.

auth.note: Project token for tracking, secret for data export

capabilities.description_for_ai: Track a user action/event in Mixpanel. Events power funnels, retention analysis, A/B tests, and user segmentation.

event.description: Event name — use consistent noun+verb pattern: 'Purchase Completed', 'Video Played', 'Button Clicked', 'Page Viewed'

properties.description: MUST include token and distinct_id: {token: 'YOUR_PROJECT_TOKEN', distinct_id: 'user_123', revenue: 49.99, plan: 'pro', source: 'email_campaign'}. Time is auto-set if not provided.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Export raw event data as JSONL for a date range. Returns one JSON event per line. Use for data warehousing and custom analysis.

from_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Max 60-day range on free plan.

event.description: Filter by event name (optional). Use ['Event 1','Event 2'] for multiple.
